zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Woodman於1679年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼薩康尼特時，她的父親Lieutnant John Woodman43歲，母親Hannah Timberlake23歲。她於1697年10月26日與Nicholas Howland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德住了大約1年。她去世於1734年3月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Woodman于1679年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼薩康尼特时，她的父亲Lieutnant John Woodman43岁，母亲Hannah Timberlake23岁。她于1697年10月26日与Nicholas Howland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德住了大约1年。她去世于1734年3月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

variants.name: Woodward
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Woodman was born on 27 June 1679, in Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Lieutnant John Woodman, was 43 and her mother, Hannah Timberlake, was 23. She married Nicholas Howland on 26 October 1697, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Rhode Island, British Colonial America for about 1 years. She died on 9 March 1734, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Woodman est née le 27 juin 1679, à Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Lieutnant John Woodman, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Hannah Timberlake, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Howland le 26 octobre 1697, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 1 ans. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1734, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Woodman am 27. Juni 1679 in Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lieutnant John Woodman 43 und ihre Mutter Hannah Timberlake 23. Sie hat am 26. Oktober 1697 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America Nicholas Howland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie hat ungefähr 1 Jahre lang in Rhode Island, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 9. März 1734 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Woodman è nata il il 27 giugno 1679 nel Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Lieutnant John Woodman, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Hannah Timberlake, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Howland il 26 ottobre 1697, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Rhode Island, British Colonial America per circa 1 anni. Morì il 9 marzo 1734, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Woodmanが1679年6月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーサコネットで生まれた時，父Lieutnant John Woodmanは43歳，母Hannah Timberlakeは23歳であった。1697年10月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでNicholas Howlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドに約1年間住んでいた。彼女は1734年3月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Woodman(이)가 1679년 6월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 사콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lieutnant John Woodman(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Timberlake(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1697년 10월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Nicholas Howland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드에서 약 1년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1734년 3월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Woodman nasceu em 27 de junho de 1679, em Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Lieutnant John Woodman, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Timberlake, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Howland em 26 de outubro de 1697, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Rhode Island, British Colonial America por quase 1 anos. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1734, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Woodman родилась 27 июня 1679 г. в местности саконнет, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Lieutnant John Woodman было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Timberlake, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Howland 26 октября 1697 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика около 1 лет. Она умерла 9 марта 1734 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Woodman nació el 27 de junio de 1679, en Sakonnet, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Lieutnant John Woodman, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Hannah Timberlake, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nicholas Howland el 26 de octubre de 1697, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Rhode Island, British Colonial America durante unos 1 años. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1734, en Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años.
